summary: Executed backend API regression tests and frontend Playwright e2e validation for Project Artemis landing page, simulation, and waitlist integration using external preview URL.

minor.issue: POST create returns 200 instead of 201 Created (REST semantics improvement).

action_items: Optional: return HTTP 201 for successful waitlist creation to align with resource creation conventions.
Refactor oversized stylesheet /app/frontend/src/App.css (>700 lines) into modular CSS files for maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: App.css is 793 lines; split into focused modules (hero/simulation/features/waitlist/footer) to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created test waitlist entries via API/UI using TEST_ and ui.test.* emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated required flows: hero content, CTA navigation, simulation inside/outside states, feature cards, waitlist submit+clear+admin count update, duplicate email handling, desktop/mobile overflow checks, and /api/waitlist GET/POST behavior at external URL.
rca of the issue: No blocking functional defects found. Minor API semantics gap: waitlist create endpoint returns 200 due to default FastAPI behavior without explicit status_code=201 on route decorator.
